name: Cottage Cheese Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the tomatoes.
2. Remove cores from each tomato.
3. Cut each tomato into wedges three-fourths of the way down.
4. Gently pull apart some of the flesh in the center of each wedge.
5. Mix together cottage cheese, salad dressing, and pepper in a bowl.
6. Stuff each tomato wedge with the cottage cheese mixture.
7. Sprinkle chopped chives over the stuffed tomatoes as desired.
8. Serve in lettuce cups.
Calories per serving: About 125
Variation: Tuna Stuffed Tomatoes
Prepare the tomatoes as above but stuff them with tuna salad (see separate recipe for "French Toasted Tuna Sandwiches"). Calories per serving: About 175.
